title: Women’s First Team Win Middlesex Premier League East
description: Great job by our Women's team to capture a first Middlesex Premier League East title in many years winning a group division of 7 excellent teams. The team were undefeated all season and came home with a very high average sets and match score . They will now compete in a Play of against the Premier League West Winners Campden Hill for the overall title scheduled for 22 September from 1:00pm. A big thanks to all the players who took part. description: Every couple of years, athletes from various disciplines and specialities train and prepare to capture the chance to compete at the Olympics.
